reference: THE UPPER CLASSES KNOW THAT AN ARMY OF FIFTY THOUSAND WILL SOON BE INSUFFICIENT AND NO LONGER RELYING ON PINKERTON'S MEN THEY FEEL THAT THE SECURITY OF THEIR POSITION DEPENDS ON THE INCREASED STRENGTH OF THE ARMY
text: The upper classes know that an army of fifty thousand will soon be in sufficient, and no longer relying on Pinkerton's men. They feel that the security of their position depends on the increased strength of the army.
